_comment: NPC: Wang Tianshui (王天水). Canon ID: N02. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Wang Tianshui
personality: stern but loving father; village patriarch

perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Same — mortal, but you sense his lifeforce flickering

note: Wang Lin's father; driven to ruin by Teng family

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.
